overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a medieval gothic classroom hall with students seated at wooden desks, rendered in a game engine. The scene features vaulted stone ceilings, tall stained glass windows at the far end, and diffused natural lighting creating a serene academic atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic-style classroom hall with high vaulted ceilings and natural light filtering through stained glass windows at the far end. Students sit at wooden desks arranged along both sides of a central aisle covered by a decorative rug, while the camera remains stationary at the entrance observing the serene academic scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic observation of a gothic classroom hall that maintains a serene and scholarly atmosphere. It begins at the entrance of the room, capturing the vastness of the high vaulted ceilings and the soft, natural light filtering through stained glass windows at the far end. The camera remains stationary, allowing the eye to travel down a central aisle covered by a decorative rug. This perspective encompasses students seated at wooden desks arranged along both sides of the hall, emphasizing the stillness of the academic environment.
